promoted_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver AND punitive damages waiver are explicit in FA §17.0
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass E, Dispute Resolution section noted 'Not explicitly stated in standard FA'
promoted_facts.action: Corrected canonical — jury trial waiver IS present in FA §17.0

promoted_facts.fact: Interest rate on overdue amounts is 18% per annum (FA §16.15), separate from the 1.5%/month service charge
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass B, Item 6 table mentions 1.5%/month late payment
promoted_facts.action: Added 18% per annum interest rate to canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Attorneys' fees: prevailing party entitled to recover reasonable fees, expert fees, court costs (FA §16.14)
promoted_facts.action: Added attorneys' fees provision to canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Restricted Area template in FA Addendum includes detailed carve-outs: other brands, 4+ hotel chains, gaming, timeshare, existing hotels
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass D noted 'may be negotiated' but did not detail carve-outs
promoted_facts.action: Added detailed Restricted Area carve-out language to canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Confidentiality of negotiated terms clause (FA §16.18) — terms negotiated between parties are confidential
Attorney-in-fact appointment: franchisee appoints franchisor as exclusive attorney-in-fact for all trademark disputes (FA §9.4.2)
Revenue Management Software (GRO/IDeaS) pricing recommendations are NOT mandatory — franchisee not required to adopt them
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Pass C noted GRO system but did not highlight opt-out
promoted_facts.action: Added to canonical — important given pending antitrust litigation
